niche.title: Secret Asian multiplication trick 😲🥶🔥 #shorts
niche.ai_blurb: This video leverages the "secret trick" hook and education-focused hashtags (#mathhacks, #mentalmath, #asianmath) that appeal to students and parents seeking productivity. Borrow the format of revealing a quick, visual problem-solving method with eye-catching emojis that signal value and surprise (😲🥶🔥).

niche.title: 🧮 9 Trick Kids Love! Can You Do It? #shorts
niche.ai_blurb: The interactive challenge format ("Can You Do It?") with a playful emoji and question encourages viewer engagement and completion. Use this approachable, inclusive hook to invite your audience to test themselves while offering a satisfying reveal of the answer.

niche.title: Basic Math Test 933 #maths #mathproblems #shorts #decodethepuzzle #mathfun #riddlejourney #quiz
niche.ai_blurb: This combines puzzle and quiz formats under hashtags like #decodethepuzzle and #BrainTeasers that target viewers seeking mental challenges. Borrow the numbered format ("Basic Math Test 933") and multi-tag strategy to reach both math-focused and riddle-loving audiences simultaneously.

niche.title: Still Guessing on MyMathLab Answers? 🤔 #onlineclasses #shorts
niche.ai_blurb: Although this video has minimal traction, it targets a specific pain point (struggling with homework platforms like MyMathLab) that shows niche audience demand. Borrow the problem-identification format with a relatable question emoji to directly address student frustrations.

niche.title: This FREE AI Tool Every Student Needs in 2026 🤯 #shorts #ai #technology
niche.ai_blurb: The "FREE AI Tool" hook taps into trending tech and student productivity interests with urgency ("Every Student Needs in 2026") and surprise (🤯). Replicate this format by highlighting exclusive, timely tools or hacks with future-focused language that drives curiosity.

general.title: he’s loving it #loveisland @Kalshi
general.ai_blurb: With 53.8M views, this Love Island-related content capitalizes on trending reality TV and celebrity/influencer culture (@Kalshi tag). Borrow the approach of tying into major pop culture moments or trending shows with simple, relatable captions that let the visual carry the story.

At 24.8M views with minimal caption/hashtag metadata, this suggests the visual content itself is the primary driver of virality. Focus on creating compelling, unmissable visuals that perform without relying on text hooks—let the hook be the video itself.

general.title: @Triplets Ghetto Kids 😍 #WeAreReady
general.ai_blurb: The Triplets Ghetto Kids collaboration (23.8M views) shows that wholesome, energetic group dynamics and dance-related content performs exceptionally well on TikTok. Borrow the formula of featuring charismatic team performers with a motivational or celebratory hashtag (#WeAreReady).

general.title: I genuinely think this might be my best dumpster diving haul of the year… 🤯 Every single thing in this video was thrown away. I still can’t believe some of the stuff I found. The craziest part? You’re seeing it exactly how I saw it thanks to my Ray-Ban Meta glasses 😎♻️ Honestly these POV shots make it feel like you’re right there digging through the trash with me 😂Which find was your favourite?? @raybanmeta #raybanmetapartner

Borrow the "Here's what I found/discovered" narrative with first-person perspective technology to create authentic, engaging storytelling around treasure-hunt-style content.

general.title: 😳 They Move Without Walking?! Would You Try This Challenge? #shorts
general.ai_blurb: The mysterious, intrigue-driven hook ("They Move Without Walking?!") combined with challenge and odd-satisfaction appeals makes this perform at 34k views. Use surprising or impossible-seeming premises with question marks to spark curiosity, then deliver the satisfying reveal.
